name: Seth Looney
title: So good!
comment: I loved it, the sushi was very fresh and the service was great!

name: Quinn McNamee
title: Ok
comment: I spilled soy sauce all over myself so it ruined the experience, but I guess the sushi was good.

name: Daniel McSandle
title: Yummy but expensive
comment: Best sushi I've ever had, but wow those prices are high.
